name: Mexican Dip (Baby Poop Dip)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cream cheese, chili, and chiles until combined.
2. Microwave the mixture for 2-3 minutes or until heated through.
3. Sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese on top of the mixture.
4. Continue microwaving for an additional 30 seconds to 1 minute or until the cheese is melted.
5. Serve immediately with tortilla chips.
